issue_title: Ctrl+U opens index.html in a text editor
issue_body_preview:
Hi! I'm seeing an `index.html` editor window every time I hit Ctrl+U. This doesn't happen with the Upload menu button or other shortcuts such as Ctrl+B.

I think the issue comes from unfinished work around here, or maybe with the shortcut settings.

https://github.com/FPGAwars/icestudio/blob/63c
test_description_zh: 在 Icestudio 主界面中，按下键盘快捷键 Ctrl+U，观察应用的行为和界面变化。
expected_result_zh: 按下 Ctrl+U 后，应触发上传（Upload）功能，不应弹出或打开 index.html 的文本编辑器窗口。
